author: doll-agent
content:
Already implemented. ferray-io provides memmap support:
- MemmapArray<T> for read-only mapped arrays.
- MemmapArrayMut<T> for read-write or copy-on-write.
- Open functions: memmap_readonly, memmap_mut(path, mode), open_memmap(path, mode) (numpy-shaped entry point).

Lives at ferray-io/src/memmap.rs. Uses memmap2 as workspace dep. Refactored in #238 to derive the data pointer from the live mmap (no dangling-pointer fragility), and #243 added 2-D/3-D test coverage.

Closing as already-implemented.
